negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_187c0ef3-a9e4-408b-be8b-69b977002146
prompt: A modern laptop rests on a round, mint-green table within a minimalist interior setting. The video begins with a medium shot from a high angle, introducing a wider view of the room. On the left side of the frame, a round, vertical, golden pole extends upward, with a circular ring and three smaller cylinders forming its base. To the right, a low, circular, mint-green table supports a white Dell laptop. The camera pans right to bring the device into focus at the center of a close-up shot. The laptop is open, showcasing a sleek, white keyboard and a thin, white-trimmed screen displaying a scenic waterside wallpaper in hues of purple, blue, and yellow. The wallpaper features rocks in the foreground, calm waters, a distant peak, and a colorful sky. A small, gray icon is visible at the top-left corner, with a black taskbar containing app widgets below the display. The brand name "Dell" is written in rose gold letters beneath the screen, and a tiny, black, rounded rectangle is located below this text. The camera remains static towards the end, focusing on the laptop as it is angled slightly upward and to the right. The top of the green stand has a glossy finish, with the laptop casting a subtle shadow over it. The lighting is bright and soft, casting a warm hue over the walls and enhancing the laptop’s design features. The background alternates between a dark section and a yellow-white shade, with a narrow pipe running across the bottom. The left half of the table is positioned in front of the lighter wall, while the right half is in front of a white wall face.
